data.body:
## TDD: This IS the RED test task

Create tests/scripts/test-acli-version-resolver.sh with behavioral tests.

## Test Approach
Tests use PATH override with mock acli script. Tests call resolver functions and assert on exit codes and stdout — no source-file grepping.

## Tests Required
1. test_parse_version_string: Mock acli outputs 'acli version 1.3.5-stable', assert output = '1.3.5-stable'
2. test_parse_version_multi: Test 2+ version strings (1.3.4-stable, 1.3.5-stable) for URL stability
3. test_construct_versioned_url: Given version and platform, assert URL matches expected pattern
4. test_sha256_computation: Fixture file, compute hash, assert matches known value
5. test_full_flow_mock: Invoke script with mocked downloads, assert exit 0 + ACLI_VERSION + ACLI_SHA256 in stdout
6. test_error_missing_acli: No acli in PATH -> non-zero exit
7. test_error_unexpected_version: Unexpected format -> non-zero exit

## .test-index Entry
Add: plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh: tests/scripts/test-acli-version-resolver.sh [test_parse_version_string]

## Integration Test Exemption
Header comment: Integration tests against live acli.atlassian.com out of scope for CI. PoC script serves as manual integration validation.

## Files
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-acli-version-resolver.sh
- EDIT: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-acli-version-resolver.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-acli-version-resolver.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'acli-version-resolver.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Integration test exemption comment in header
  Verify: grep -q 'out of scope for CI' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-acli-version-resolver.sh
